message:
extensions: ExtensionManifest + WasmExtensionLoadSpec + HostState tools sharing

New types for extension manifest handling:

ExtensionRuntime enum:
- Js: JavaScript extension runtime
- Wasm: WebAssembly extension runtime

ExtensionManifest struct:
- schema: must be "pi.ext.manifest.v1"
- extension_id: lowercase alphanumeric with dots/dashes/underscores
- name, version, api_version: metadata fields
- runtime: Js or Wasm
- entrypoint: path to entry file
- capabilities: list of required capabilities
- capability_manifest: optional detailed capability config

ExtensionManifestSource:
- Combines manifest with root path and manifest_path
- entry_path() helper to resolve entrypoint

ExtensionLoadSpec enum:
- Js(JsExtensionLoadSpec): existing JS extension loading
- Wasm(WasmExtensionLoadSpec): new WASM extension loading (feature-gated)

WasmExtensionLoadSpec:
- manifest, manifest_json, root, entry_path fields
- Used by WasmExtensionHost for instantiation

HostState improvements:
- tools field changed from ToolRegistry to Arc<ToolRegistry>
- new_with_tools() constructor for external tool registry injection
- Enables sharing tools between WASM instances

WasmExtensionHost additions:
- instantiate_with() method accepts Arc<ToolRegistry> and optional manager

Validation:
- extension_id_regex(): validates format (lowercase, max 64 chars)
- validate_extension_manifest(): enforces schema, id, name, version rules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
